entity: 2024-25 Oklahoma City Thunder regular-season record 68-14 (1-seed in West, SGA MVP, best OKC season since 1995-96 Seattle SuperSonics)
notes: Warehouse row matches BBR (68-14, 1st in West/Northwest). SGA won his first MVP; the 68 wins were the 2nd-most in OKC/SEA history (behind the 1995-96 Sonics' 64-win season, since OKC's all-time record was already captured).
